name: offline-banner
description: A banner that appears on its own the moment the browser goes offline and clears when the connection returns — the first real consumer of use-online. SSR-safe, renders nothing while connected.

notes: The offline state is a role=alert, announced assertively the moment it appears
The reconnected note is a polite role=status so it doesn't interrupt
Renders nothing on the server (assumed online) so there's no hydration flash

intents: show a banner when the user goes offline
warn that changes may not be saved while the network is down
examples: <OfflineBanner className="sticky top-0 z-50" message="No connection — retrying…" />
